headline: Vistra Declares Dividend on Common Stock, Series B Preferred Stock, and Series C Preferred Stock
summary: Vistra (NYSE: VST) announced today that its board of directors has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.2290 per share of Vistra's common stock, reflecting an estimated aggregate payment of approximately $75 million this quarter. The common dividend is payable on June 30, 2026, to common stockholders of record as of June 22, 2026. The ex-dividend date for the common dividend will be June 22, 2026.

headline: Vistra or Southern Co.: Which Utility Stock Looks Stronger in 2026?
summary: Vistra's nuclear push and cheaper valuation give it an edge over Southern Company as utilities race to add clean power to their portfolio.

headline: Vistra Corp. (VST) Earnings Expected to Grow: What to Know Ahead of Next Week's Release
summary: Vistra (VST) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: Assessing Vistra (VST) Valuation After Recent Share Price Volatility
summary: Why Vistra is on investors’ radar today Vistra (VST) is drawing fresh attention after recent share price moves, with the stock closing at $153.79 and showing mixed returns over the past week, month, and past 3 months. For investors watching US utilities, Vistra’s current valuation metrics, recent annual revenue of US$17.7b, and net income of US$752 million offer a starting point for assessing how the market is currently pricing this integrated power and retail business. See our latest...
